templates.title: Simple AES encrypt/decrypt (PyCryptodome/stdlib)
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}_encrypt(plaintext, password):
    """AES-GCM via cryptography (fallback: XOR). Return base64."""
    try:
        import os, base64
        from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.ciphers.aead import AESGCM
        from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.kdf.pbkdf2 import PBKDF2HMAC
        from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import hashes
        salt = os.urandom(16)
        kdf = PBKDF2HMAC(hashes.SHA256(), 32, salt, 100000)
        key = kdf.derive(password.encode() if isinstance(password, str) else password)
        aes = AESGCM(key)
        nonce = os.urandom(12)
        ct = aes.encrypt(nonce, plaintext.encode() if isinstance(plaintext, str) else plaintext, None)
        return base64.b64encode(salt + nonce + ct).decode()
    except Exception:
        # Fallback XOR (NOT SECURE, demo only)
        import base64
        key = (password.encode() if isinstance(password, str) else password)
        data = plaintext.encode() if isinstance(plaintext, str) else plaintext
        out = bytes(b ^ key[i % len(key)] for i, b in enumerate(data))
        return base64.b64encode(b'XOR' + out).decode()

def {{nama_fungsi}}_decrypt(token, password):
    import base64
    raw = base64.b64decode(token.encode())
    if raw.startswith(b'XOR'):
        key = password.encode() if isinstance(password, str) else password
        data = raw[3:]
        out = bytes(b ^ key[i % len(key)] for i, b in enumerate(data))
        return out.decode()
    try:
        from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.ciphers.aead import AESGCM
        from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.kdf.pbkdf2 import PBKDF2HMAC
        from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import hashes
        salt, nonce, ct = raw[:16], raw[16:28], raw[28:]
        kdf = PBKDF2HMAC(hashes.SHA256(), 32, salt, 100000)
        key = kdf.derive(password.encode() if isinstance(password, str) else password)
        aes = AESGCM(key)
        pt = aes.decrypt(nonce, ct, None)
        return pt.decode()
    except Exception as e:
        raise ValueError("Decrypt failed") from e
